steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage claims “African languages also made important contributions to the Puerto Rican dialect” and then begins an example with “For example.” This structure signals that the blank should demonstrate how these contributions appear in the dialect.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Traced to” shows that Puerto Rican vowel pronunciations can be attributed to Yoruba pronunciations—demonstrating how an African language influenced the dialect and supporting the passage's claim that African languages made “important contributions.” The other three choices don't establish any causal relationship showing linguistic origin. That matches choice B — B is correct.
